case_title: REMY CHIAPOLINI VS. ALL GREEN CARPET CLEAN OF BAY AREA CORP.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-11-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-21-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE RE: NOTICE OF LEVY, MEMORANDUM OF GARNISHEE AND WRIT OF EXECUTION; (FEE FOR SERVICE:$165.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIAPOLINI, REMY AS TO DEFENDANT ALL GREEN CARPET CLEAN OF BAY AREA CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF REMY CHIAPOLINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALL GREEN CARPET CLEAN OF BAY AREA CORP. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED (WRIT RETURNED UNSERVED) AS TO DEFENDANT ALL GREEN CARPET CLEAN OF BAY AREA CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIAPOLINI, REMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL GREEN CARPET CLEAN OF BAY AREA CORP. $474.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $519.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
